zh.Fulbourn, South Cambridgeshire District,: 英國坎布利其爾福爾布
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gregory Clark於1452年出生時，他的父親Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer32歲，母親Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham27歲。他於1475年與Elizabeth Sotherland在英國諾福爾可沙利頓結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1530年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特享年78歲。

zh-hans.Fulbourn, South Cambridgeshire District,: 英国坎布利其爾福爾布
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gregory Clark于1452年出生时，他的父亲Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer32岁，母亲Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham27岁。他于1475年与Elizabeth Sotherland在英国諾福爾可沙利頓结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1530年在英国英格兰薩默塞特享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Clark
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English clerk, clark ‘clerk, cleric, writer’ (Old French clerc; see Clerc ). The original sense was ‘man in a religious order, cleric, clergyman’. As all writing and secretarial work in medieval Christian Europe was normally done by members of the clergy, the term clerk came to mean ‘scholar, secretary, recorder, or penman’ as well as ‘cleric’. As a surname, it was particularly common for one who had taken only minor holy orders. In medieval Christian Europe, clergy in minor orders were permitted to marry and so found families; thus the surname could become established.
Irish (Westmeath, Mayo): in Ireland the English surname was frequently adopted, partly by translation for Ó Cléirigh; see Cleary .
Americanized form of Dutch   De Klerk   or Flemish   De Clerck   or of variants of these names, and possibly also of French   Clerc  . Compare   Clerk   2 and   De Clark  .

variants.name: Clarke
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Clark  .

History: This name was brought independently to New England by many bearers from the 17th century onward. Nicholas Clarke was one of the founders of Hartford, CT (coming from Cambridge, MA with Thomas Hooker) in 1635.

variants.name: Clerk
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Jacques.
Americanized form of French   Clerc   and perhaps also of the Dutch and Flemish cognates   De Klerk   and   De Clerck   or of variants of these names. Compare   Clark   3.

variants.name: Clerkin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Liam, Brendan, Dympna, Seamus.

Irish (Monaghan): from an Irish pet form of English clerk ‘cleric’ (Irish cléireach), see Clark . Alternatively, an Anglicized form of Ó Cléireacháin, ‘descendant of little cleric’, an Irish diminutive of the word. See also McClurkin , an Antrim surname from Mac Cléirchín ‘son of little cleric’.

variants.name: Calarco
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Angelo, Carmelo, Fausto, Nunziato, Salvatore.
Italian (southern): probably a nickname derived from Greek kalē archē ‘good beginning’. Compare Clark 4.

variants.name: Clerc
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Odette, Sebastien, Serge.

French: occupational or status name for a member of a minor religious order or for a scholar, Old French clerc, from Late Latin clericus, from Greek klērikos, a derivative of klēros ‘inheritance, legacy’, with reference to the priestly tribe of Levites (see Levy ) ‘whose inheritance was the Lord’. In medieval Christian Europe, clergy in minor orders were permitted to marry and so found families; thus the surname could become established. In the Middle Ages it was virtually only members of religious orders who learned to read and write, so that the term clerc later came to denote any literate man, a scholar (hence its modern meaning ‘scribe, secretary’ or ‘clerk’). Compare Leclerc .

variants.name: Clarkson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): patronymic from   Clark  .

nameMeanings.name: Gregory
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Latin Gregorius from the post-classical Greek name Gregōrios ‘watchful’ (a derivative of gregōrein ‘to watch, be vigilant’). The name was a very popular one among the early Christians, who were mindful of the injunction ‘be sober, be vigilant’ (1 Peter 5:8). It was borne by a number of early saints. The most important, in honour of whom the name was often bestowed from medieval times onwards, were Gregory of Nazianzen ( c.329–90 ), Gregory of Nyssa ( d. c.395 ), Gregory of Tours ( 538–94 ), and Pope Gregory the Great ( c.540–604 ). A famous bearer of the name in modern times is the film star Gregory Peck ( 1916–2003 ). The name has traditionally been popular in Scotland, where it is often found in the form Gregor .

en.lifeSummary: When Gregory Clark was born in 1452, his father, Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer, was 32 and his mother, Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham, was 27. He married Elizabeth Sotherland in 1475, in Sharrington, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1530, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gregory Clark est né en 1452, son père, Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Sotherland en 1475, à Sharrington, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1530, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gregory Clark 1452 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer 32 und seine Mutter Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham 27. Er hat 1475 in Sharrington, Norfolk, England Elizabeth Sotherland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1530 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gregory Clark è nato il nel 1452, il suo padre, Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Sotherland nel 1475, nel Sharrington, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1530, nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 78 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Gregory Clark(이)가 1452년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1475년 영국 노르폴크 샤링턴에서 Elizabeth Sotherland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1530년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gregory Clark nasceu em 1452, seu pai, Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Sotherland em 1475, em Sharrington, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1530, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gregory Clark родился в 1452 г., его отцу по имени Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Sotherland в 1475 г. в местности шаррингтон, норфолк, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1530 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gregory Clark nació en 1452, su papá, Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Sotherland en 1475, en Sharrington, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1530, en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 78 años.
